name: Ian Larson
description: Ian successfully received his JrL1 certification on September 28th, 2025 at the WOOSH Rocketry field — a significant milestone for both Ian and the High Power Rocketry program.

name: Kellen Fukumoto
description: Kellen successfully received his JrL1 certification on February 28th, 2026 at the Quad Cities Rocketry Club field — expanding the team's certified pilots as the program continues to grow.
